summary: Soft Delete Transfers Feature Testing Complete - All 17 backend tests passed. P1 Critical feature verified: transfers are now soft-deleted (marked is_deleted=true) instead of hard-deleted.

soft_delete_core.feature: SUPER_ADMIN can soft-delete transfers via DELETE endpoint
Transfer record remains in database with is_deleted=true
Soft-deleted transfer disappears from Transfers Queue list
Repeat delete on same transfer is idempotent (returns already_deleted=true)

authorization.feature: Non-SUPER_ADMIN returns 403 Forbidden when trying to delete

regression.feature: Transfers Queue SUBMITTED tab loads correctly
Transfers Queue COMPLETED tab loads correctly
Transfers Queue REJECTED tab loads correctly

backend_changes: DELETE /api/v1/admin/transfers/{transfer_id} - Changed from delete_one() to update_one() with soft-delete fields
Soft-delete fields: is_deleted=true, deleted_at, deleted_by, deleted_by_email, previous_status
Audit log action changed from TRANSFER_PERMANENTLY_DELETED to TRANSFER_SOFT_DELETED
database_changes: Added index for is_deleted field in transfers collection
Added compound index for (is_deleted, status, created_at)

critical_code_review_comments: Soft delete implementation is correct - uses update_one with $set instead of delete_one
Idempotent behavior implemented correctly - repeat deletes return already_deleted=true
All transfer query endpoints properly exclude soft-deleted records with the filter: {$or: [{is_deleted: {$exists: false}}, {is_deleted: false}]}
Audit trail captures previous_status field for audit recovery if needed

success_rate.frontend: Verified via screenshots - Admin dashboard and sidebar navigation working

seed_data_creation: Used existing test transfers from test user ashleyalt005@gmail.com for soft delete testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soft delete for transfers is now implemented and working. All 17 tests pass. The TRANSFER_SOFT_DELETED audit log entry is created when a transfer is soft-deleted. One test transfer was soft-deleted during testing: b7579d79-a63a-4853-98ec-d8f48b89ccf0 (Badge Test Recipient). The transfer list queries now properly exclude soft-deleted records.

audit_log_sample.description: Transfer to Badge Test Recipient (€1.00) soft-deleted. Previous status: SUBMITTED
